# Track clean aperture dimensions atom

**Data field**

An atom that carries the pixel dimensions of the track’s clean aperture.

## Overview

See [doc://com.apple.qtff/documentation/quicktime-file-format/Track_clean_aperture_dimensions_atom].

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit integer that specifies the number of bytes in the track aperture mode dimensions atom.
- **Type**: A 32-bit integer that identifies the atom type.
- **Track production aperture dimensions atom**: An atom that carries the pixel dimensions of the track’s production aperture.
- **Track encoded pixels dimensions atom**: An atom that carries the pixel dimensions of the track’s encoded pixels.
